project: SICOT – Système Intégré de Coopération Internationale et de Traduction
currentSprintFocus: Sprint 9 (Portail Documentaire Externe, M8-bis) IN PROGRESS — server module + client page built, uncommitted. Sprint 11 (Analytics & Rapports, M11) planned/backlogged, not started. Sprints 6/7 (Tests/Recette, Déploiement) postponed until after 9/10.
status: Sprints 1–5 + 8 COMPLETE ✅ (7a1de70). Server refactor pass COMPLETE ✅ (dd2809d). Sprint 11 planned (47ffd94) — no code yet. Sprint 9 (Portail Documentaire Externe) built + committed (47ef8b8) — functional but has a known route-naming bug, not yet manually verified end-to-end.

activeSession.task: Sprint 9 — Portail Documentaire Externe (M8-bis), committed 47ef8b8: new server module `modules/portal` (service/controller/route) exposing a public, unauthenticated document portal — browse (`GET /api/portal/documents`), metadata (`GET /api/portal/documents/:id`), inline view (`GET /api/portal/documents/:id/consulter`), email-gated download-link generation (`POST /api/portal/documents/:id/token`) sending a UUID token via email, token redemption (`GET /api/portal/telecharger/:token`), and admin-only visibility toggle (`PATCH /api/portal/documents/:id/visibilite`, requires admin role). Schema: `documents.visibilitePortail` (bool) + `documents.portailTokenDureeJours` (int, null=permanent) added to documents table; new `portailTokens` table (token UUID, email, expiresAt, utiliseLe, ipUtilisateur) for tracking download links. Only documents with `statutOCR = 'traite'` are ever exposed. Client: new `PortalPage.tsx` (public portal UI, 489 lines) + `portal.api.ts`, wired at route `/portal` in App.tsx and nav item in Layout.tsx (`nav.portail` i18n key). `DocumentsPage.tsx` gained a 'Portail Externe' column + toggle-visibility dialog (duration select: 7/30/90/sans expiration) calling `portalApi.toggleVisibilite`. Also: `index.ts` import cleanup (dropped stray `.js` extensions on notifications/jobs/email imports for consistency), i18n formatting pass (prettier-style line wraps, no content change besides new `portail` key).
activeSession.nextAction: Verify Sprint 9 with `tsc --noEmit` on both packages, manually test the /portal flow (browse → consulter → token email → download). Fix the route naming bug: server mounts at `/api/portal` (English) and DocumentsPage links to `/portail` (French) — nav item in Layout.tsx correctly points to `/portal` matching App.tsx's route; DocumentsPage.tsx's 'Exposé' link href="/portail" is a bug (404), should be `/portal`. Also generate/apply a Drizzle migration for the new schema (hand-edited, no migration file yet). After Sprint 9 lands: Sprint 11 (M11 Analytics) is scoped but unbuilt — see docs/TASKS.md Sprint 11 section. Also open: Sprint 8 leftover 'seed parametres via Drizzle migration'; re-enable auth rate limiter (commented out in index.ts).

stack.client: React 18 + Vite 5 + Tailwind v4 + framer-motion v12 + react-hook-form + zod + axios + TanStack Query
stack.server: Express 4 + Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL + bcryptjs + jsonwebtoken + nodemailer + node-cron

criticalRules: NEVER run shadcn CLI — Tailwind v4 incompatibility
NEVER put transition inside framer-motion Variants objects
NEVER use CORS origin wildcard with credentials: true
ALWAYS use @/ path alias for client imports
ALWAYS use ANAC design tokens (bg-anac-navy), never raw hex
